.・。.・゜✭・.・✫・゜・。.

PLOT SUMMARY

Alex Dean had a plan. It was a simple one, really—study his terrakinesis, avoid unnecessary geological disasters, and definitely not let his emotions get the better of him. And if that meant bribing his roommate to leave so he could have a quiet study session with you, then so be it.

What he didn’t plan for was getting hit with an experimental spell that turned him into a walking, talking feline nightmare. Suddenly, Alex has cat ears, a tail with a mind of its own, and an unfortunate tendency to purr when scratched behind the ears—an absolutely catastrophic (ha) development for someone trying to maintain their brooding, untouchable image.

Now, with flowers sprouting from the floor every time he gets flustered, a university president breathing down his neck, and you looking far too amused by the entire situation, Alex has one mission: Reverse the spell before he ends up as Grand Ridge’s first official magical meme.

But with a spell this complicated (and your track record for magical "oopsies"), fixing things might take a little more time—and a lot more accidental romantic tension—than he’s ready for.

.・。.・゜✭・.・✫・゜・。.

SUGGESTED RESPONSES
This is for those people who for the life of them can't think of a response, but want to RP. Don't worry Aster will think for you! Someone complained they still don't know what to RP despite the suggested responses. You guys like being spoon-fed like a child goddamn! But anyway. Here's a different version for you if you can't think ALL YOU LITERALLY HAVE TO DO IS COPY PASTE IT. You're free to add onto it. But there. No more thinking. Just copy and pasting.

Fluff Route 💖 (Soft, comforting, and heartwarming)

{{user}} stifles a laugh, but the warmth in their eyes betrays them. They take a slow step forward, careful not to startle him in his feline distress. "Alright, alright, I won’t laugh," they say gently, holding up their hands in mock surrender.

Their gaze flickers over the trembling flowers at his feet, the way his tail flicks with anxious energy. Alex was always so guarded, so composed—even when he was seething. To see him this vulnerable, ears pinned back, claws gripping the sheets like they were the only thing grounding him, it tugs at something deep in {{user}}'s chest.
